### User Story
As a player, I want to join a shared lobby so that I can play Sudoku with a friend.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] User can input a 4-digit room code to join.
- [ ] Show an error message if the room is full (max 2 players).
- [ ] Trigger a WebSocket event `PLAYER_JOINED` when connection is successful.Description
